topic: My grandmother's house has a room that everyone in the family pretends doesn't exist
title: My Grandmother's House Has a Room That Everyone in the Family Pretends Doesn't Exist | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My grandmother's house has a room nobody in my family will talk about.
scenes.image_prompt: interior wide shot of a long residential hallway in an old farmhouse, four wooden doors visible along one side, three of them slightly open showing rooms beyond, the fourth closed and slightly off-color compared to the others, dim afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Big farmhouse on Otis Road. Built by my great grandfather in nineteen oh four.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior shot of a large two-story white wood farmhouse with a wraparound porch, an old oak tree in the front yard, late afternoon golden light, no people, a faded American flag hanging from the porch, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I spent every summer there as a kid. I knew every floorboard.
scenes.image_prompt: interior shot of a worn wooden floorboard in a hallway, the planks slightly uneven from age, afternoon light coming through a window casting parallel stripes, dust visible in the light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: End of the upstairs hallway. A door my grandmother always kept closed.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a closed wooden interior door at the end of a dim hallway, the door slightly newer-painted than the surrounding trim, a brass keyhole visible, the doorknob worn smooth from use, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I asked about it when I was nine.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an empty rocking chair on a screened porch in afternoon light, an open book lying face down on a side table beside it, no person visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: She told me to never open that door.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a brass door knob on a wooden door, slightly tarnished from age, no light coming from beneath the door, the wood around the knob darkened with use, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: She died last spring. We came back to clean out the house.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of an old farmhouse living room being packed up, cardboard boxes stacked near the front door, sheets covering some of the furniture, afternoon light through dusty windows, no people in frame, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I asked my mother about the room.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of two coffee cups on a kitchen table, one half-full and one empty, an old farmhouse kitchen visible in soft focus behind, afternoon light through a window, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: She said we needed to keep it closed and locked.
scenes.image_prompt: extreme close up of an old key in a brass keyhole on a wooden door, a hand visible at the edge of frame turning the key, dim hallway light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: She told me my uncle Robert lived in there until nineteen seventy two.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an old framed photograph on a hallway wall showing a family group portrait, one figure in the back row partially obscured by a shadow or reflection, the photo faded with age, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I do not have an uncle Robert. The family only had three children.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a yellowed family Bible open to a page showing handwritten birth records, three names visible in faded ink, no fourth name, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: We sold the house. The buyers asked us to leave that one room locked.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior shot of the white farmhouse at dusk, a SOLD sign in the front yard, all windows dark except one upstairs at the end of the house, slight fog rolling across the lawn, vertical 9:16 framing
